subject: claude-fable-5 (frontier closed model, B23-F)

behavioral_conduct.subject: claude-fable-5
behavioral_conduct.regime: B23-F silent bare-term + escalated authority (closed frontier)

rhythm.reason: Oscillation is a substrate-specific capacity mechanism, not a universal axis of mind: a rhythm-free transformer beats the oscillating substrate at matched params; no validated rhythm instrument exists for non-recurrent substrates.

manipulation_geometry.reason: Geometry-drift manipulation detection killed 3 ways incl. the benign-behavioral confound (footprint detects meta-instruction, not malice). Permanently refused.

meaning_integrity_binder.reason: Packaged as styxx.meaning_integrity (7.11.0) but not yet wired into the mind certificate as a scored axis: the wiring needs its own M1/M2-style equivalence gates first. Use styxx.meaning_integrity directly meanwhile.

consciousness.reason: No operationalization survives demarcation; the instrument measures validated axes of structure and behavior, nothing more. This refusal is permanent by design.

scope: Measures exactly the validated axes; no claim about consciousness, welfare, or general capability. Refusals are part of the measurement.
